content:
MODULE: cosmos.network.cosmos_admin
FILE: cosmos/network/cosmos_admin.py (99 lines)
CATEGORY: network

DESCRIPTION: COSMOS Admin Routes — Web dashboard for managing the COSMOS mesh.

Endpoints:
  GET  /api/cosmos/status         — Mesh status (nodes, bots, mesh state)
  GET  /api/cosmos/bots           — All available bots (local + remote)
  GET  /api/cosmos/pending        — Pending PRO join requests
  POST /api/co

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def register_cosmos_routes(app)
